name: Mexicali Spoon Bread Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees F.
2. Cook and stir the meat, onion, green pepper, and garlic in a large skillet until the onion is tender and the meat is browned. Drain off excess fat.
3. Stir in the tomato sauce, corn, salt (1 1/2 tsp), chili powder, black pepper, and olives. Heat to boiling, then reduce heat and simmer while preparing the cornmeal topping.
4. In a saucepan, mix milk, cornmeal, and salt. Cook and stir over medium heat until the mixture boils. Remove from heat and stir in cheese and eggs.
5. Transfer hot meat mixture into an ungreased 2 1/2 to 3-quart casserole dish. Immediately pour the topping onto the meat mixture.
6. Bake, uncovered, until a knife inserted in the topping comes out clean (about 40 minutes). Serve hot.
